question: You told us Barzani slept by day and sat awake all night in his Diwan in Naghadha — 50 to 60 people sitting on Persian rugs around him while he talked. Approximately what year(s) were you visiting him there? Did Nigaar come with you? Who else was usually in the Diwan: his sons, ministers, family, foreign visitors? What kinds of things did he talk about? Did you ever speak, or did you mostly listen?
answer: was April 1974 . Nigaar was not  sitting with us but she was sitting with Barzani family the ladies were gathered ina
